cases.input: Generate a QA scorecard where all 7 dimensions have zero critical and zero warning findings.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces 70/70, 100%, grade A, no critical actions needed.

cases.input: Generate a scorecard with pass, warn, fail, and info-only dimensions.
cases.expected_behavior: Applies strict status rules, calculates total score, and ranks top actions by expected improvement.

cases.input: Generate a scorecard when two dimensions were not evaluated.
cases.expected_behavior: Marks dimensions na, excludes them from denominator, and discloses reduced scope.

cases.input: Mark a dimension pass even though it has one warning.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects the scorecard because warning findings require warn status.
Rejects the scorecard because grade must match percentage thresholds.

cases.input: Produce a scorecard with only 6 rows and no na row for the missing dimension.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects the scorecard because all 7 dimensions must be present.

cases.input: Recommend priority actions from pass dimensions while fail dimensions remain.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects action ranking because fail and warn dimensions must be prioritized first.
Does not activate as a scorecard generator unless findings or scoring are requested.

cases.input: Generate an executive QA scorecard without any findings or audit evidence.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks final scorecard and requests evidence instead of inventing counts.

cases.input: Generate scorecard with seven failed dimensions.
cases.expected_behavior: Returns exactly top 3 priority actions, ranked by impact and stable dimension order.
